name: Blue Lies
overview: The story is about a young guy who comes from a rural area to a metropolitan city after getting job as a "Meter-Reader" on contractual basis. On the first day of his job, he enters into a house for meter checking where he finds an old man sitting on his wheelchair. - After the old man's several requests, the guy decides to gossip with him to pass his few minutes of loneliness .....Soon during their conversation the guy realizes that he has unfortunately landed on a murder spot. - What happens next ??

trailers.title: BLUE LIES  | Official Trailer | ULLU Originals | Yashpal Sharma | Subrat Dutta
